steps.title: Use the linear form
steps.content: For $g(x)=mx+b$, the value $b=g(0)$ is the y-intercept. From the table's pattern, find slope $m$ from any two rows, then back-solve for $b$ using $b=g(x)-mx$.

steps.title: Compute b
steps.content:
Using the table values, the consistent slope and intercept give $b=37$.

The answer is 37.
